summary: The user is planning a dinner party for 8-10 guests and is considering using their grandmother's antique fine china. They seek menu suggestions and table-setting tips to create an elegant atmosphere, as well as advice on displaying antique pieces, including a 1920s Art Deco vase and an antique sewing machine, to enhance the dining experience.
facts: The user is planning a dinner party for 8-10 guests this weekend. The user is considering using their grandmother's antique fine china for the dinner party. The user loves the Classic Elegance menu suggestion, which includes Oysters Rockefeller, Beef Wellington, and Lemon Lavender Crème Brûlée. The user plans to display their 1920s Art Deco vase on the mantel and an antique clock on a side table. The user intends to display their antique sewing machine on a decorative table near the window to highlight its intricate details. The user will keep the surrounding area of the sewing machine simple and uncluttered to let the piece shine.
